title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 267.707 - County certified as "scabies free area", when
text:
267.707.  County certified as "scabies free area", when. — When all flocks of sheep and goats within a county have been inspected by a representative of the department or of the division and are found to be free of scabies, the department may certify the county as a "scabies free area".
(L. 1961 p. 26 § 12)
